---
applyTo: "public/**/*.html,public/**/*.css,public/**/*.js"
---

Build the frontend with the simple browser stack defined by the project.

Use semantic HTML, accessible form labels, clear headings, and status text that does not rely on color alone.

Keep the UI simple enough for a live workshop: clear inputs, readable results, loading state, empty state, and error state.

Use browser APIs to call the local backend. Do not add a bundler, framework, state library, CSS framework, or build step unless the spec explicitly requires it.

Make the UI visually clear with simple sections, readable spacing, and text labels for important states.
